svg.title: Pixel Eruv — Networking Flow (WebSocket + Protobuf + ECS Replication)
svg.desc: End-to-end networking flow. Forward lane (client to server): Browser sends ClientFrame protobuf over WSS via Traefik to the Pusher, which validates the token, assigns a client_id, and forwards Input/Interact frames to NATS Core; the World Simulator applies them authoritatively in its tick loop. Return lane (server to client): the World Simulator replication pipeline (dirty flags, per-tick scheduler, AOI filter, delta encoder, protobuf component serializer) emits a per-client ReplicationBatch of SpawnEntity/UpdateComponent/DestroyEntity/PlayAnimation, published to NATS, forwarded by the Pusher as a single WebSocket frame, decoded by the Browser into its local entity store.
svg.text: Networking Flow — WebSocket + Protobuf + ECS Replication
ClientFrame (input path, ▲) · ServerFrame / ReplicationBatch (replication path, ▼) · binary protobuf over WSS, NATS Core between Pusher and World Sim

g.text: ▼ return: ServerFrame → ReplicationBatch (spawn · update · destroy · animation)
